sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102748" key="tawniko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τᾰωνικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n102748.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">peacock-coloured</tr_>, i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shot with various hues</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἱμάτια</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg008:158:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Mete.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">158.33</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
